## Data checklist

- [ ] No private account, payment, billing, or order data is included.
- [ ] No tokens, cookies, private repository links, internal issue links, or local filesystem paths are included.
- [ ] Price records include source, confidence, verified date, tax note, and status.
- [ ] Unverified records are marked `needs_review`.
- [ ] Source quality matches the confidence/status assigned to each changed record.
- [ ] No cross-region purchase or payment-workaround guidance was added.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run validate:data`
- [ ] `npm run build`
